                                 *********************************************

                                    NUMERICAL ELECTROMAGNETICS CODE (NEC-2D)

                                 *********************************************




                                     - - - - COMMENTS - - - -


                          Two-antenna array, baseline = 500 mm                                       
                          For mutual coupling analysis at 610 MHz                                    
                          Antenna 1: tags 1-14 at X offset = 0                                       
                          Antenna 2: tags 15-28 at X offset = +500 mm
